resources.string: Enter 4 digit PIN code that you received via SMS

"Mercedes-Benz Türk A.Ş. Akçaburgaz Mahallesi, Süleyman Şah Caddesi, No:2 34522 Esenyurt, İstanbul
Telephone: 0212 867 30 00 pbx mbt_app@daimlertruck.com
Board of Management
MBT, Head of Board of Management (CEO), Süer Sülün MBT, Board Member, Production Bus, Bülent Acicbe MBT, Board Member, CFO MBT, Tülin Mede Esmer MBT, Board Member, Executive Vice President Production Trucks, Ulf Raese
Süer Sülün, Head of Board of Management, CEO Mercedes Benz Türk A.Ş. Bülent Acicbe, Board Member, Production Bus Andreas Bachhofer, Board Member, Production Truck Tülin Mede Esmer, Board Member, CFO MBT Şükrü Bekdikhan, Head of Board of Management, MB Cars Tufan Akdeniz, Board Member, Vans Manfred Ausweger, Board Member, CFO MBO Özlem Vidin Engindeniz, Board Member, Global IT Solution Delivery Center Stefan Karrenbauer, Managing Director of Mercedes Benz Finansman Türk A.Ş.
Commercial Register Number: 94468 VAT Identification Number: 7-9159-7212-1615130
Copyright 2018-2026 Mercedes-Benz Türk A.Ş. All Rights Reserved."
COST CENTER / ORG. UNIT / COMPANY CODE
Enter the code you received via SMS:
Please click on Sign In button and continue with authentication steps.
You should accept the terms of use in order to continue otherwise you can close the app if you do not want to accept.

string.name: TXT_PROFILE_SETTINGS_QUIT_WARNING
string.font: Are you sure you want to sign out?

resources.string: You have to remove root from your device for execute this app.
Company location and Shuttle Type parameters cannot be empty.

Push notifications are activated for this app in the system settings. Push services are used for informing you about company news (such as events, discounts). Please decide whether you want to keep this setting for this app or change them in the Android system settings.
